_comment: Shared, environment-agnostic TypeScript defaults for all workspace packages. Packages set their own module/moduleResolution, lib, jsx, emit (outDir/declaration/rootDir), and paths. Kept free of `baseUrl` and `moduleResolution: node` (deprecated in TS 6, removed in TS 7) and of `moduleDetection: force` (would break the ambient `declare module` typings under src/types).
